tailorAssist.paragraph: I treated this as a Data Engineer at Mayzax Solutions draft and made data, SQL, and amazon web services easy to find. You already had the right raw material: data, SQL, amazon web services, and PostgreSQL. I pushed that proof forward in Centi – Personal Finance App. Prove people-facing sales readiness through communication, outreach-adjacent service work, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest. I trimmed Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser, SecureScape – Smart Security System, and ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection because they were weaker signals for this read. The biggest help here: kept the projects that best prove the role fit, reframed your experience around the job's strongest signals, and gave the summary a clearer role-specific angle. Under the hood, I changed the summary, experience, projects, skills, and which sections show based on those signals.

details.title: What I prioritized
items: Prove people-facing sales readiness through communication, outreach-adjacent service work, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest.
I prioritized customer communication, people-facing work, revenue-adjacent metrics, relationship handling, sales readiness, and domain-relevant product interest.

details.title: Why it changed
items: Target story: Proven experience in building data pipelines and backend services, with strong skills in Python, SQL, and PostgreSQL.
Main evidence themes: data processing, ETL pipelines, and backend services.

details.title: Summary choice
items: I showed the professional summary because the summary can connect the candidate's experience to the role's requirements and highlight relevant skills.

details.title: What I spotlighted
items: BitGo Software Engineering Intern
Centi – Personal Finance App

details.title: What I trimmed
items: Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser
SecureScape – Smart Security System
ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection
Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website
SentimentTrader - Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline
NumPy
AWS (EC2)
AI-Driven Workflows

details.title: Related evidence
items: data engineering: related evidence includes etl, sql, and schemas.

details.title: Not directly evidenced
items: I did not claim git, Google Cloud Platform, azure, kafka, airflow, data engineering, certification support, and kaf because I could not verify that exact experience in the resume.

details.title: Before you send
items: Do not call the candidate a sales professional unless formal sales or outreach....
I treated git, google cloud platform, azure, kaf as review items, not resume claims, because I could not verify them in the resume.
Related evidence can support the broader story, but not exact ownership of git, g.
Some JD terms were not directly evidenced: git, google cloud platform, azure, and kafka.
Review the skills list; a few useful-but-lower-priority skills may have been trimmed.
